name: Udio API

performance.notes: Generation takes 20-90 seconds; requires async polling; outputs 32-second clips

agent_readiness.notes: Submit generation, poll for status. No official SDK. Generates 32-second clips that can be extended. Less polished API than Suno.

gotchas: API docs sparse and frequently outdated
No official SDK — entirely manual HTTP
Less reliable uptime during peak times
best_when: Suno competitor alternative for cost or quality preference
Short audio clips for prototyping creative AI apps
avoid_when: Teams needing SDK and documentation quality
summary: Udio is an AI music generation platform competing with Suno. Similar async generation model with even less API maturity — sparse docs, no SDK, no webhooks. Generates 32-second clips. Only reason to choose over Suno would be output quality preference or pricing. Not production-ready for agent workflows.
